productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boy Striped Blue Shorts
description: Composition Blue shorts, has an elasticated waist, two side pockets, two patch pockets at the back with flaps and stitch detailing, two patch pockets with flaps and smaller pockets on the sides, belt to accessorise and loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations His cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little boy in these shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
